name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late payments. We automate invoice extraction and payment scheduling instead of spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Delayed payments due to manual invoice processing
